human_actions_pending.context: These were Claude's recommended defaults, not user-confirmed, because interactive confirmation timed out during discuss-phase

decisions.decision: New separate vec_search_chunks virtual table for search, not reusing vec_chunks from EpochCompressor
decisions.rationale: vec_chunks are epoch-level compressed summaries with speaker_label hardcoded to 'epoch'; search needs verbatim quotes + real speaker + model_version column for SRCH-04; vec0 virtual tables don't reliably support ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN

decisions.decision: Backfill via manual toggle in SettingsPanel.tsx, not auto-run
decisions.rationale: User-confirmed (D-02) — indexes all meetings missing vec_search_chunks rows on toggle-on

decisions.decision: Search panel as full-overlay modal within existing 380px BrowserWindow, following SettingsPanel pattern
decisions.rationale: No precedent for multi-window management in the app; keep consistent with existing UI pattern
